entry.title: Re: BAPI for Manage RFQ in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi @SKMeera 
You can use BAPI : BAPI_RSSRVSCMB_SAVEMULTI2 to create custom migration objects
Otherwise, ltmc or Winshuttle are the other options. 
Hope this helps! Cheers, Remi

entry.title: Re: Custom Code decommission - Transaction usage
entry.content: Hi Kumar, in general I would say the Decommissioning Cockpit function has been working fine for decades in helping many customers indentifing unused objects. I haven't seen 'false positive' entries during support. It is possible that certain customer may have unique custom codes that may not be recorded due to limitation, but that should be very rare case. In order to discuss further on the transaction usage not recorded symptom, you can raise a support ticket under component SV-SMG-CCM for detailed checking.

entry.title: S/4HANAバージョンアップ後にエラーが発生する。BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE VLA316
entry.content:
ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

S/4HANAバージョンアップ後（1909 -> 2023）に「BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE」を実施すると旧環境(1909)と事象が変わりました。

旧環境(1909)では購買発注の保管場所を設定して入荷伝票の保管場所がブランクでも、「BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE」を実行して入庫登録が可能でした。

しかし、新環境(2023)では入荷伝票の保管場所を設定していないとエラーが発生し、発注伝票に保管場所を入れても以前の様に入庫登録できない事象が発生しました。（エラー：VLA316）

2023でこの汎用モジュールの変更はございますでしょうか。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT does not exist in system
entry.content: We would like to use program ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT to analyze the delivery split issue, but when I tried to run it via SE38/SA38, it said the program does not exist, could you suggest what program else we can use?

entry.title: Re: Adjusting Reconciliation Account in Asset Accounting...
entry.content:
Hello @VanessaBrixle ,

Please consider using App: Post Transfer - Within Company Code to transfer the asset value to a new asset class with the correct account determination configuration.

Kind Regards,

best regards,

liling

entry.title: Re: I can not uploading credentials to the Secure Area.
entry.content: Please refer to KBA2436508 - How to access Customer Remote Logon Depot to maintain system logon credentials - SAP for Me

entry.title: Is it possible to compare historical inventory between MB5B and MC.A?
entry.content:
we found the stock in history is different in two transactions MB5B and MC.A, but the current stock is the same.  

I see the logic in MC.A is: 

Total stock  = S032-MBWBEST ( valuated stock ) – S031- MZUBB( valuated stock receipt quantity ) + S032- MAGBB ( quantity of valuated stock issues )

What is the logic of MB5B for historical stock? 

Is it possible to compare historical inventory between MB5B and MC.A?

entry.title: Need to display Sales Order Header pricing conditions in Delivery Header document - Config Details
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to display Sales Order Header pricing details in Delivery Header level but Invoice will happen based on Sales Order pricing only. I read in community that  we can modify Copy controls but not sure which options to Choose. I want help to understand if this can be possible using Config only and what are the steps to do. Please advise

entry.title: Re: Decimal symbol showing in the query results from hana...
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP HANA database returns the correct result, as as showing in hdbsql output.

The reason is the UI (SAP HANA Studio) formats the result as 'JAVA style'.

You can change the formatting by below setting in HANA Studio:

  1. Go to 'Window' menu;
  2. Click Preference;
  3. Navigate to 'SAP HANA' →'Runtime' →'Result';
  4. Deselect the 'Format values' checkbox.
  5. And then Apply.

Regards,

Prince Ebi

entry.title: Re: Payroll Error (T512W)
entry.content: One of the wage type with following grouping is missing in table T512W , Request to maintain the missing entries and re run the payroll

entry.title: Re: SAPBusinessOne-How to use Formatted Search to Copy th...
entry.content: Thanks, it worked!

entry.title: Re: Mobile device recommendation for SAP Service and Asse...
entry.content:
@Shirsendu_Roy51 Please have a look at this SAP note  3270771 - What are the minimum requirements / supported mobile devices to install/use SAP Service and Asset Manager 

There is no definitive list of supported devices, as various factors determine whether a device is suitable for SSAM use. However, based on testing conducted by the product team, there are recommendations regarding operating systems, memory, and other specifications to consider when running an SSAM application.

entry.title: Unable to update the Content Package in SAP Build Workzone Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I made some changes in the content package (in BAS) and successfully build it. But when i try to update the content package in the Channel Manager, it's showing an error message which i am attaching below. The ID remains same in the manifest file but still it's shows uploading with different ID. Please help me!!

 

@jens_kristen , can you please help me!

entry.title: Cash Collection Tracker - Account Receivable
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We have 2 questions;

  1. What is the logic to get figures of due in previous periods, due in selected period, and new invoice due? We read this logic 3474257 - Cash Collection Tracker - Accounts Receivable App ID F2925 - SAP for Me and try to compare between this tile and FBL5N, but always got difference figures.* We need your advice to compare and get same values between this tile and FBL5N.
  2. We want to enhance or customize this tile so that we can see the details of every column in the Cash Collection Tracker tile. Is it possible to view the details of each column after double-clicking? If so, how can we enhance it?

Please provide feedback on these,

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - Connect to Microsoft 365 Mail with OAuth2
entry.content:
We’ve successfully implemented an SAP Integration Suite iFlow that connects to an Office365 mailbox using the OAuth2 Authorization Code (Microsoft 365) credential type in the Manage Security Material section.

During setup, we manually authorized the credential via the popup Microsoft login screen, which worked as expected.

In the SAP Manage Security Material there is a Refresh Token Expiry set to 90 days.   The SAP Help on this says The SAP Cloud Integration system will update the refresh token before the expiration.

Can anybody confirm this works and so I do not need to manually authorise this every 90 days

entry.title: Re: Workforce replication from SAP Successfactors to SAP S/4HANA Cloud using SAP Master Data Integra
entry.content: Thanks , we had solved the issue , but thanks for giving the references.

entry.title: Re: Mobile device recommendation for SAP Service and Asse...
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal78 Thank you for the clarification.

entry.title: Confirming capabilities of SFTP connections of BTP and ECPayroll's ABAP
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Background:

- We are already using BTP to develop and run quite a number of existing integrations between EC and external systems.

- We are going to implement new EC Payroll module to our SF application.

- We have a number of external systems (non-SAP) that EC Payroll will need to integrate using SFTP. Some of these external systems are upstream systems and some of them are downstream. They all have their own SFTP servers, and our SF solution needs to connect to these SFTP servers to pull and/or push files respective to the integration.

 

Questions:

1. What are the pros and cons of using BTP vs using ABAP of EC Payroll to interface with external SFTP servers?

2. Does ABAP support SFTP connectors natively, or will it require additional SAP modules or additional development of the SFTP library and SFTP keys management? (The connections to the external SFTP servers must not be through HTTPS).

3. Can you provide sample code or links of making SFTP connections and managing SFTP credentials using BTP and ABAP (of ECPayroll) respectively?

4.1 Is PGP supported by BTP?

4.2 Is PGP supported by ABAP?

 

Thanks!

Michael

entry.title: Re: Having Trouble Uploading XSD File to "Define Statutory Report" Fiori App?
entry.content:
Hi HuyNguyen1,

It could be possible that the xsd file you re uploaded might not be complete(Schema validation, XSD Validation etc). Could you try uploading a file as is and see that is working, if yes, then it could be a schema validation error. Do try this out and see if the XSD is valid.

Thanks,
Prasanth

entry.title: Auto-populate Supplier Field in Asset Master When Asset Acquired via PO – SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have a question regarding the integration between the asset acquisition process and the asset master data.

When I acquire an asset via Purchase Order (PO) – by specifying the asset number directly on the PO line – the system correctly posts the acquisition upon goods receipt. However, I noticed that the "Supplier" field (in the Origin tab) of the Asset Master Record is not automatically updated with the supplier from the PO.

My expectation is that this supplier should be populated automatically, similar to how it works in some On-Premise configurations. Is there a way to enable this behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

  • Do I need to adjust any configuration via CBC / SSCUI?

  • Or is this a limitation of the Public Cloud version?

  • Any workaround to link the supplier info to the asset master?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,

Thanh Ha

entry.title: Scenario Step Identifier in SAP Business One Integration Framework
entry.content:
Hello,
I am working on configuring scenario packages in SAP Business One Integration Framework and need help understanding how to find and use the Scenario Step Identifier.

  • I have set up the scenario but when I try to proceed, I am unsure which step identifier to use.

  • I have checked the scenario package settings and the SLD, but the correct step identifier is not clear.

  • Could someone guide me on how to locate or define the Scenario Step Identifier?

 

when i click sender button show this error.

entry.title: Re: CDS Custom entities with Association
entry.content:
Hello, Thanks for the nice blog.

I tried to implement Custom entity for Header and Item as you shown above. I implemented RAP application by exposing entities and service binding. But, when I try to click on row to navigate to Object page, debugger reaches in the class twice for Header entity itself. Ideally it should reach once at Header and next in Item entity.  I am using S4HANA ON PREMISE 2022 version. 

What could be the reason ?

entry.title: I want to convert text to YAML in a SAPUI5 application using TypeScript.
entry.content:
We are currently developing a SAPUI5 application in TypeScript.
We would like to use the following CDN to convert a YAML file loaded as text to YAML, but the application deployed on SAP BTP is unable to load the CDN and perform the conversion. (It can be read in the local environment.)

"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/yamljs@0.3.0/dist/yaml.min.js"

Is there any way to use a CDN with TypeScript?
Also, is there any other way to convert from text to YAML other than CDN?

 

Currently, it is set up as follows, as it was when it worked with Javascript.

index.html

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/yamljs@0.3.0/dist/yaml.min.js"></script>

Component.ts

sap.ui.loader.config({
	paths: {
	  "yamljs": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/yamljs@0.3.0/dist/yaml.min"
	}
});

Master.controller.ts

import * as YAML from "yamljs";

const YAML = (window as any).YAML;
var nativeObject = YAML.parse(strDataReplace);

The errors displayed are as follows

TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'parse')

entry.title: Re: SLD 1000170: DB version and System DB Status not disp...
entry.content:
Hi 

It looks like SLD version is 10 2108.

And as per platform support matrix document:

https://help.sap.com/doc/011000358700000032462013e/9.3/en-US/B1_Platform_Support_Matrix.pdf

SQL 2017 is not supported with any any version of SAP Business One 10.

Please use supported version of SQL and check issue again after this.

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Material is not defined for sales org, distr.chan, la...
entry.content: Material 1900000025 is not defined for sales organisation 100 and distribution channel 10 and Language DE

entry.title: Re: Push to Po failed
entry.content: Check whether you need to carry out code corrections as per SAP note 2519298

entry.title: Add custom button in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I’m working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, and I have a requirement to add a custom action button to a standard Fiori application. As we know, direct modification of standard apps is restricted in the public cloud.
Can anyone guide me on the possible extensibility options to achieve this?
Is there any supported way to add a custom button using Developer Extensibility or any?
If not directly possible, is there any standard app developed using RAP BO (Restful ABAP Programming Model) that supports custom action extensions?
Ideally, I want to add some custom button and logic behind that button.

entry.title: Re: Mass Change of Sales Orders / F5211
entry.content: It is not clear what the issue is. Please explain what is your requirement and what is the issue

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields: How to add a custom field to a specific Fiori UI section
entry.content:
HI Adam,
thanks for the feedback!

regarding your question "Is is possible to set a custom field to read only so that it can only ever be updated via custom logic?":
Yes...in general this is possible. Anyway...whether it is possible for the concrete standard application UI in your concrete use case depends on the fact whether SAP application development responsible for this standard application UI provided the neccessary extensibility enabling.
You can figure out whether this is the case in your situation and see what you have to do by following the following set of blogs:
Start with the overview blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/custom-fields-in-s-4hana-how-to-control-field-properties-like-mandatory/ba-p/13948682 
From there pick the respective blog that is the right one for our standard application UI at hand:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/key-user-custom-fields-in-sap-s-4hana-sap-gui-uis-how-to-control-field/ba-p/13948775

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/key-user-custom-fields-in-fiori-uis-based-on-segw-odata-services-how-to/ba-p/13948823

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/key-user-custom-fields-in-fiori-uis-based-on-odata-services-exposed-with/ba-p/13948911

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/field-control-for-developer-extensibility-custom-fields/ba-p/13948884

In case the standard application UI in your situation does not support field control for key user custom fields please create a customer influence request (follow the instructions in blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/submitting-new-feature-requests-sap-customer-influence/ba-p/12840274)  for that or create a ticket on the respective application component responsible for the respective standard application UI.
Best regards
Georg

entry.title: A priority 'Very High' SAP Note/KBA をメールで受信する方法
entry.content:
S-UserがA priority 'Very High' SAP Note/KBA をメールで受信する方法を教えて欲しい。


私のS-User設定では、A priority 'Very High' SAP Note/KBAというメールが送られてくるが、弊社の他のメンバー（責任者設定）には送られてきません。


どのように設定変更すれば良いのか教えてください。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: A priority 'Very High' SAP Note/KBA をメールで受信する方法
entry.content:
ご質問について、以下のKBAを参考してください。

2342391 - How to access and use the SAP HotNews application - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: PERIOD ERROR
entry.content:
Hello Pushpa -

It is not recommended to initiate the posting period at this stage. However, if it was opened by mistake, you can restart the posting period by first removing the plant-to-company code assignment and then entering the correct data in transaction OMSY.

thanks

Ankur

entry.title: Re: ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT does not exist in system
entry.content:
Hello Murphy,

This is a custom program - please connect with ABAP team to enable this in your system.

 

thanks,

Ankur

entry.title: Hi!Some data in the Prod and Non-Prod systems are not matching which is difficult to validate
entry.content:
I'm currently testing a file upload in the Non-Production environment before moving it to Production. I ran the job in the Non-Production, and it was failing due to rejections because some products are present in Production but not in the Non-Production.  During validation in the planning view, I observed that data is missing for certain periods in Non-Production. For the upload to proceed, we require complete data coverage across all relevant time buckets.

Upon further analysis, it appears that the discrepancy may be due to certain master data elements being available in Production but not in the Non-Production environment.

Could anyone advise on the best approach to handle such a scenario and ensure consistency between environments?

entry.title: Re: ** TEAM FPM ** A new UI Concept for the SADL based Application Creation Tool
entry.content:
Hello Michael,

see the coding in Feeder Class CL_FPM_SADL_ACT_SELECT_ENTITY, method GET_DATA:

The list of BOPF entities is collected via 

cl_sadl_entity_factory=>get_instance( )->value_help_entity(
               EXPORTING
                 iv_type     = ms_entity_key-type
                 iv_max_rows = 999
               IMPORTING
                 et_entities = lt_entity ).

Later, the entity is checked via private method  CHECK_ENTITY_KEY_ID. With regard to a Read scenario (-> consumption mode SADL_QUERY, the SADL entity must be prepared for this. Similar to the CRUD scenario (consumption mode TRANSACTIONAL).

The latest SAP Notes are 3625633, 3625877 and 3626033. But they related to the naming of Configuration IDs.

Best regards,

Simon

entry.title: Re: I want to convert text to YAML in a SAPUI5 applicatio...
entry.content:
Always use this, it´s the best practice way to include third party libs

https://www.npmjs.com/package/ui5-tooling-modules

entry.title: Re: Error messages you might encounter when using the ABAP RESTful programming model
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer,

I'm working on a Clean Core project using SAP S/4HANA 2023 SP1 to achieve a Cloud Certified Solution. I attempted to expose a CDS view as an OData service using the @Analytics.query: true annotation, along with a Service Definition and Service Binding, to be consumed by a custom SAP UI5 Analytical Page application. However, I encountered the following error when accessing the backend OData service:

"FETCH API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity."

The OData service works correctly when using the @OData.publish: true annotation, but this approach is rejected by the ATC Cloud Readiness Check.

Please kindly help me provide guidance on resolving the error with @Analytics.query: true or suggest an alternative approach to expose the CDS view as an OData service that complies with Clean Core and Cloud Readiness requirements.

entry.title: Re: How To Maintain Custom Form (PDF version) By Default...
entry.content:
Greetings,

use the save as variant functionality and save the form name in the variant.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow for Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi

Please add steps to maintain email notification template for sending PO approval email to approver. 

I am not sure how can we add PO details in the email content if we copy template: SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS.

The standard email templates are available for approved, rejected and reminder notifications by SAP. 

 

Thanks

Ravi Aswani

entry.title: Re: BAPI for Manage RFQ in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello @SKMeera , 

To migrate the open RFQ you can utilise BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA & BAPI_QUOTATION_CREATEFROMDATA2.

Additionally, Quotation created via application Manage RFQ uses different document type which supported external Quotation process via SAP Business network and will only be visible in your Fiori application - Manage RFQ.

 

thanks,

Ankur

entry.title: Re: How To Maintain Custom Form (PDF version) By Default...
entry.content: Hello @Shree78  - easiest way to do this - create variant and ask save that as default 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to add FIORI app to SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi yang_aiolos,

Please refer to Expose Launchpad Content to SAP BTP | SAP Help Portal for guidance on how to expose your business role (your corresponding Fiori app) from the SAP BTP ABAP Environment to SAP Build Work Zone.

Hope that helps and best regards,
 Ingo

entry.title: Re: How to translate ABAP Cloud Multidimensional Analysis...
entry.content:
Hi Oliver, I assume the Multidimensional Analysis (MDA) App was created from Manage KPIs and Reports, right? If yes, currently there is no auto way of translating the MDA APP title and sub title to another language, the user who created the MDA app need to click the "Maintain Language" button to maintain corresponding target language, then save and publish. If the target language title and sub title also need to be in follow-on system such as quality and production system, need to export in maintaining system, and import in follow-on system. Regarding transporting, please refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/d71dbe6f06764e91a8344ea53cbd1d95.html?state=DRAFT

If any furthere question, you can call/ping me directly via MS teams.

Best regards,

Tikeer

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow - Istanbul, Turkey
entry.content:
Join the SAP ALM Roadshow and learn to shape your ALM Strategy, manage your on-premise and cloud, hybrid landscapes and get the most value from your SAP solutions.

Experience the empowerment through an in-person event. Network with experts to accelerate your implementations and efficiently operate your SAP landscape using SAP’s ALM portfolio. A great opportunity to engage with SAP's ALM experts and product management team.

Registration opening soon!

NOTE: This is an in-person event and is free to attend.

entry.title: Re: Enhance Your RAP Application with CDS View Extensions
entry.content: Nice Solution Aman , Thanks for the information.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Application Lifecycle Management(CALM)--Pre-Requisites, Integration
entry.content: informative.

entry.title: Request for Official SAP Documentation for GST India – End-to-End Process and Configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA implementation project with a focus on Indian GST compliance. However, I am unable to locate any official and comprehensive SAP documentation that covers the end-to-end GST India configuration, including Condition based GST approach .

Could you please assist by providing the links or references to the latest official SAP documentation or configuration guides on the following:

  1. GST India Implementation (end-to-end including tax code setup, reporting, and compliance)

  2. Standard SAP Processes for Accounts Payable under GST

  3. Standard SAP Processes for Accounts Receivable under GST

  4. Any SAP Notes, SAP Help Portal links, or Best Practice Explorer content relevant to Indian GST

My objective is to ensure our implementation aligns with SAP's best practices and complies with Indian statutory reporting formats such as GSTR-1, GSTR-2A/2B, GSTR-3B, and E-invoicing.

Looking forward to your kind support.

Best regards,
Amrit Ravindra 

🔍

entry.title: Outbound delivery has been deleted but it was appearing in VF04 Transaction.
entry.content:
Outbound delivery has been deleted but it was appearing in VF04 Transaction. so how can we delete the entry in VF04. 

I have checked relevant tables LIKP, LIPS document not showing.

VL02N

entry.title: Re: Sap project system integration with production order
entry.content:
According to your question, you can use the scope item "6GD - Engineer Products and Systems - Project with Production" to achieve the requirement.

Link: https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/6GD?region=DE

entry.title: Re: How to change the Rating Calculation in Performance a...
entry.content: Hi @JM_1, thank you for response! Our intention is more to change the calculatiuon method that the system is using completely. We also posted a Improvement Request regarding the topic and would be glad if you like it https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/351036

entry.title: Re: ZBPR is missing, once updated but not reflecting for all users at the same time

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP New Syntax

entry.title: Goal Plan state not updating in performance form
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have established the Goal Plan states in xml, and they work as expected in Goal Plan page when we change them manually.

We have also inserted the goal plan states in the performance form.

However, the states are not updated automatically in the corresponding route steps.

Do you have any suggestions how to fix this ?

Thanks,

Konstantina

Can you please give me the steps that where i can see the option like "Enabled for data import" .

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Brisbane - Christmas in July!
entry.content:
The SAP community in Brisbane is invited to a night of festive flair, laughter, and networking at our much-anticipated Christmas in July Stammtisch!

Dress Code: Think festive fun! Don your best Christmas hat, winter jumper, or Yuletide accessory to help us turn up the cheer.

Expect great company, hearty conversation, and plenty of holiday-inspired vibes—even if the weather outside isn’t frightful. Whether you’re in the SAP space or just curious about the community, this is your chance to connect, unwind, and enjoy a mid-year celebration with a twist.

🎉No agendas. No presentations. Just people and good vibes.

Let us know you’re coming—and feel free to bring a friend. Extra style points for elf ears or light-up antlers!

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: Is there a tool that detects/checks SAP Add-ons
Re: ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT does not exist in system
entry.content:
Hello @Murphy_Wang93 

The ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT report is a SAP tool delivered with the note 355404 - Why was a delivery split during creation?

You need to implement this note in your system.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT does not exist in system
entry.content: How is that supposed to help?

entry.title: Re: ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT does not exist in system
entry.content: Indeed it is a Z-report, but it is a SAP delivered one.

entry.title: change Backroundcolor for separate workspace
entry.content: I have two environments in SAP, a test environment, an AI and a production workspace. Now I want to give each workspace a separate background color. Does anyone know how to do this?

entry.title: Re: authorization required access to login sap btp trial on eclipse
entry.content: If these solution don't work try deleting the default_abap account in BTP_COCKPIT and start abap booster and retry using that service key again

Hi Experts

 

Does the mobile app feature post 1H 2025 update stopped supporting Custom MDF Object?

Created a custom card and added the custom MDF object in the New People profile which is visible in Web and not in mobile. 

Checked the object permission and API visibility, everything looks fine. 

Looking forward for your input.

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 TPM Solution UX/UI enhancement
entry.content: @VinayKumawat , Did you found which alternative can be used to create, deploy and debug the CRM application ?

entry.title: 3th SAP Stammtisch in Cape Town!
entry.content:
We're happy to announce the third SAP Stammtisch in Cape Town! This event format in South Africa is all about the latest SAP news and innovations—a space to connect, share, and learn.

What’s It About?

This is a casual, community-driven meetup where everyone is welcome—SAP users, developers, consultants, architects, business analysts, and project managers. If you work with SAP in any way, join us, bring a friend, and share your thoughts!

Where?

We’re hosting the event at La Parada in Constantia Nek. Nestled at the foot of Table Mountain, this vibrant spot offers stunning views, great food, and a relaxed atmosphere—perfect for inspiring conversations and networking.

Who Can Join?

Absolutely everyone!

Who is behind the SAP Stammtisch?

Usually, the SAP Stammtisch is driven by the community itself, but it always needs a trigger to get started. That’s why Robert Peter and Ute Buerkle taking the first step to bring SAP professionals together, spark conversations, and help the SAP community in Cape Town flourish. 

Shortly about Robert: After launching my own business around SAP Customer Experience Consulting and Development, redcup code in Cape Town, I realised that while SAP communities thrive worldwide, there hasn’t been an SAP Stammtisch in South Africa—until now!

Shortly about Ute: She has been a valued expert in the SAP ecosystem for over 30 years. With deep knowledge and experience across numerous SAP projects, she has contributed significantly to the community and inspired many professionals. Now semi-retired, she remains passionate about sharing her knowledge and helping the SAP community thrive.

Let’s build this network together—see you on July 17h!

Looking forward to meeting you there! 🙂

entry.title: Re: ERROR WHILE USING DTW
entry.content: Thanks, the problem is solved

entry.title: Pricing error in item 000010
entry.content: While creating Invoice- Vf01 for my sales order. Invoice no generated and getting a notification like Pricing error in item 000010 and also net value is showing zero

entry.title: Solace to SAP CPI: Step-by-Step Configuration Guide from Scratch : part-2
entry.content:
In this blog, I’ll guide you through setting up Solace from signing up on the solace console to creating queues, Topics and testing message flows. Whether you’re new to event mesh technology or planning to integrate Solace with the sap cpi, this step-by-step guide will help you get started confidently.

Solace Event Broker, also known as Advanced Event Mesh (AEM), enables event-driven architecture by allowing seamless integration between enterprise systems like SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) and message brokers.

Step-1 : Access to the Solace Platform

To get started, visit https://solace.com and click on the Register button and fill the all mandatory credentials and if you have already an account click on the Login button at the top right corner. From there, you can create a free trial account to access the Solace Platform .

Step-2: Sign Up / Log In:

 If you’re new to Solace, click on Sign Up to register as a new user. If you already have an account, simply log in using your valid credentials and Jump to Step4.

Step-3: Provide Valid Sign-Up Details

If you're signing up for the first time, ensure you enter all the required and accurate information during the registration process to successfully create your account.

Step- 4: Access the Solace Console

After successfully logging in, you will be redirected to the Solace platform, where you can begin managing your messaging services.

Step-5:Navigate to Cluster Manager

On the left-hand panel of the Solace Console, under Component Services, click on Cluster Manager.
The Cluster Manager is where you create and manage your Solace messaging services (brokers). It allows you to define the environment, cloud provider, region, and service type to provision a messaging service According to your needs.

Step-6: Create a New Service

To create a new Solace messaging service, click on Create Service and provide the following details:

  • Service Name

  • Environment (e.g., dev, test)

  • Cloud Provider (AWS, Azure, etc.)

  • Region (choose the one closest to your location)

For learning and development purposes, select the Service Type as Developer, which is a free-tier option suitable for testing and non-production use. It allows you to explore key features like topics, queues, and basic message flow without incurring any cost.

Once all the details are filled in, click on Create Service.

Step-7:Service Added to Cluster Manager

Once the service is successfully created, it will appear under the Cluster Manager dashboard.
Locate the newly created AWS Developer Service card (or the corresponding cloud provider you selected), and click on it to open the service details and launch the messaging console.

Step-8:Use Basic Authentication

To connect with your Solace Event Broker, either for testing within the console or integrating with SAP Cloud Integration (CPI)—you’ll need to authenticate using Basic Authentication.

From the “Try Me!” tab:

  • The Client Username is auto generated

  • The Client Password is masked but can be copied using the icon beside the field

  • These credentials allow you to publish and subscribe messages securely via the broker

These credentials are essential for establishing a secure connection from CPI to Solace using the AEM (Advanced Event Mesh) adapter, especially when sending data to queues or topics.

Step-9: Data Publishing Methods

  1. Topics (Publish/Subscribe Pattern)
  • Allows broadcasting messages to multiple subscribers.
  • Every subscriber listening to a topic receives a copy of the message.

Delivery Modes:

  • Direct: Messages are sent immediately and not stored in the broker.
  • Persistent: Messages are stored until acknowledged by the receiver.

  1. Queues (Asynchronous Processing)
  • Used to store and manage messages between systems.
  • You need to provide a Queue Name to place data in the queue.

Delivery Modes:

  • Direct: Messages are sent immediately and not stored in the broker.
  • Persistent: Messages are stored until acknowledged by the receiver.

Step-10:Subscribing to Data

Subscribing to data in Solace is a straightforward process once the connection is established. It uses the same authentication credentials as the publisher to ensure consistency and security.

  • Use the same client username and password that were used to publish messages.

  • After a successful connection, navigate to the Subscriber section in the Try Me! console.

  • Enter the exact topic path used during publishing. Solace uses hierarchical topic structures, so the path must match exactly for the subscriber to receive the intended messages.

Step-11:Verify Data and Status

After subscribing, you can check the data and its status at the bottom of the Subscriber Panel

Steps to Connect Solace to SAP CPI :

Step-1:

Go to the try me in the solace platform and copy the username and password in the solace that are provided.

Step-2: 

Go to your SAP Integration Suite and then go to the monitor page then go to the Security Material and add user credentials that copied for the solace.

Step-3: 

configure the sender Advance Event Mesh Adapter in the sap iflow 

Copy the Broker URL and username  from try me in the solace platform and give it in sap AEM sender adapter connection

Fill the required fields and select the Basic Authentication  and give the password secure alias name as we given in the security material

In this way we can configure the solace to the sap cpi using Advance Event Mesh sender and Receiver Adapter

This guide walked you through the complete setup of Solace Event Broker, from account creation to message publishing and subscription and sending data from sap and receiving from the solace.
With topics, queues, and authentication configured, you now have a solid foundation for event-driven messaging.

entry.title: Re: Down Payment at header level of a Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello Diyvesh, Thanks a lot for your input. I have read that if I assigned billing plan ‘01’ or ‘02’ to a sales document like ‘OR’ for example this will set the billing plan at header level.

How does this work if you say that SAP standard doesn’t support billing plans at the header level of a sales order?

Does that mean in this process although I have enabled my billing plan at header level, I still need to maintain the down payment at item level? Please clarify. Thanks again

entry.title: Re: wbmr was not created from the forwarding agreement
entry.content: I customized the service groups in SOAMANAGER but still I don't see any queue generated in SRT_MONI or WBMR was not genrated. Any other setps or customization to validate ?

entry.title: Public Cloud: Depreciation Key for Half Year Convention in Chart of Depreciation "IFRS"
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I have the following problem:

We have the depreciation Key “LINH” in Chart of Depreciation “3910”. Here the period control method is set to “006” by SAP standard. Behind that period control method, there are several values that control at what time the system starts to calculate the depreciation of the asset.. This is what our customer needs for local accounting standards. We want to use IFRS as a tax ledger, as we cannot use the extension ledger due to lack of integration with asset accounting. 

Above you can see a screenshot of “LINH”. We see Period Control Method “006”. Under the column “Acq” there is the value 04, which stands for First year convention at half year start date:


This is exactly what we need in the IFRS Chart of Depreciation. So far so good.

Now, the period control method “006” in Chart of Depreciation “IFRS” differs from “006” in “3910”. 
The following screenshot is “006” in “IFRS”: 



As you can see, under column “Acq”, the value is 01, which stands for pro rata at period start date. This means Period Control Method 006 from 3910 is NOT the same as period control method 006 in IFRS. This is the real problem, as the system does not allow us to open the value help of the period control method, to see which method has 04 in acq. We do not have any option to look up, what period control method in Chart of Depreciation “IFRS” has the correct values in the columns to the right. That is also why we cannot fill out the template provided by SAP Support as we do not know what the period control method is controlling in the background. Additionally, we received the following screenshot from the support, which values are possible: 

As we can see, there is no value that has 04 in Aqc Column. Does anybody know any workaround in this regard? I would really appreciate any kind of advice,

Best regards
Elen

entry.title: Trial balance report not showing BP filter and GL filter on Selection Criteria screen
entry.content:
Dear 

I have limited finance license.

I am trying to run Trial balance report, which is not showing the BP filter and GL filter on Selection Criteria screen.

Even i select proper date range, it is not given any result but the following error.

"Data is not available; modify selection criteria and re-enter [Message 131-85]"

 

Please what is going wrong ?

entry.title: Re: Pricing error in item 000010
entry.content: The error is very clear that the condition type for pricing in sales order is missing in billing document.  Go to Analysis tab and see why it is missing

entry.title: Re: TCS Configuration for Scrap Sales in India (SAP Publi...
entry.content:
Hello,

Starting April 1, 2025, the requirement for sellers to collect TCS on goods sales exceeding  ₹50 lakh under Section 206C(1H) is omitted. Refer to the following note.

3576728 - Finance Bill 2025: Abolition of TCS under Section 206C(1H) - S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - GST IN - SAP for Me

PV

Best regards,

Jens

entry.content:

Thanks for your reply. Initially, I maintained both service groups by selecting the connection type: Service Group based, Request response. After your reply I changed the connection type to service group, one way. But still the issue presists and I am not able to see any failed or Unprocessed queue in SRT_MONI. The ppf has the sort key blank too. Please let me know if I need to validate anyother settings in SOAMANAGER.

entry.title: A Rundown of API Lifecycle in SAP BTP: End - End tutorial for beginners
entry.content:
Introduction: In this weblog, I'll give you a rundown of API lifecycle in SAP BTP - beginning with how to create an API Provider, API Proxy, testing a Product through the Developer Portal.

(I) Create API Provider: For creating an API provider first go to Configure>>APIs>>API Providers>>Click on Create>>Give the details like name, host, authentication>> then save it and test the connection.

(II) Create API Proxy:  Select the API Provider which you have created above then select the service from the available list for your Api Provider.

Specify the Proxy Details: name>title>>base path>>version>> click on create and review the target endpoint and resources>>then save it>>Deploy it for activation of your API proxy.

(III)  In this step we need to add policies click on the policies>>edit>>flows>>TargetEndpoint>>PostFlow

Here, I have added two policies one is Assign Message Policy and another is Basic Authentication.

In Assign message policy- 

(i)add name 

(ii) the XML, editor give your username and password  

 

 

Now you have to add Basic Authentication Policy here you have to add the name and check these details like Endpoint type, flow type and stream.

Then Click on update>>save>>redeploy it again.

(IV) For Creating a Product - Engage>>Product>>Create

Then move to APIs tab press on add button>> now choose the API which you have created earlier>>click on OK button and then publish it

You will see there will be an entry in APIs column with the status of Published.

Click on Explore our Ecosystem >> Developer Hub

Now you can see there is a product. 

(V) Test the Product: Select the Product>> ProductSet >> GET /ProductSet >>Try it out >>Execute

Then it will give the response of Product Set with a HTTP status code 200.
